ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used by the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package maintainer */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is distributed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the package was last updated */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the package has been downloaded */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars or likes the package has received */,
  "issues_count" INTEGER /* Number of open issues for the package */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the package is private or public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES maintainers ("maintainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintainers" (
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintainer */,
  "maintainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the maintainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the maintainer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the maintainer (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the maintainer */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the maintainer's GitHub profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintainer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintainer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being depended on */,
  "dependent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that depends on the other package */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., import, export) */,
  "heaviness" REAL /* Heaviness of the dependency relationship */,
  "min_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the dependent package required */,
  "max_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the dependent package allowed */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the dependency is optional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports another package */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being imported */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., function, class) */,
  "import_path" TEXT /* Full import path of the imported package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the import was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the import was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exported_classes" (
  "exported_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exported class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that exports the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the exported class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exported class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was first exported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exported_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exported_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exported_functions" (
  "exported_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exported function */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that exports the function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the exported function */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exported function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was first exported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exported_function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exported_functions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness_scores" (
  "heaviness_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness score */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being scored */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the heaviness score was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the heaviness score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_scores_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package with the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was first reported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the user */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's GitHub profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the package */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
